programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Rory calls Lorelai from Rome and admits she made a mess of things with Dean; Dean's wife throws him out of the house after she finds a letter from Rory; Luke and Lorelai are interrupted by a town parade.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Lorelai is offended that no one appears to care about her relationship with Luke, until it becomes the topic of a heated town-meeting discussion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Safari Romance
programme.desc: Working on protecting the wildlife in Africa, a biologist teams up with a theme park designer who wants to create an over-the-top safari attraction.

programme.title: Love in Store
programme.desc: Two rival shopping hosts are forced together while competing for a promotion and find that their on-air chemistry kindles an off-air spark.

programme.title: The Real West
programme.desc: A family vacation to a working Ranch introduces Professor Rebecca to Jake West. Rebecca is a widower chasing tenure and Jake is a handsome cowboy who never settled down.

programme.title: I'll Be Seeing You
programme.desc: When a work errand derails Amy's weekend plans with her grandma, they embark on a road trip with one sentimental detour but need the help of a charming activities director.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The roommates welcome Rose's recently blinded sister, whose independent manner is deceptive.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche panics when her father reveals his outlandish plans for the future.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche falls for a handsome and successful businessman but is unsure whether she wants to take on the responsibility of his young children.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche's professor tells her that she can pass her course easily, in return for unsavory favors.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche, Dorothy and Rose vie for a charity award while fighting the flu.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose must look for work after she loses her grief-counseling job.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The roommates welcome Rose's recently blinded sister, whose independent manner is deceptive.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche panics when her father reveals his outlandish plans for the future.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The faith of the Walton family is sorely tried when Olivia contracts polio, and the doctor says that she may never walk again.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Olivia tries a radical polio treatment developed by Sister Kenny of Australia.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy heads for a mountain cabin to write, but ends up delivering an old schoolmate's (Sissy Spacek) baby.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Realizing that his wife has gained quite a bit of weight, Brock consults Reba on how best to handle the delicate situation.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: The family learns that Cheyenne no longer wishes to pursue a career in dentistry after she turns down Brock's offer to intern at his office; Barbara Jean is called for jury duty.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: A miscommunication with her brother, Bryan, sends Barbra Jean to his place for Thanksgiving, while he goes to Reba's.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: After observing their constant bickering in the office, Reba and Van's boss insists they see the company's occupational therapist.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba must care for Brock, who has kidney stones while Barbra Jean is away; Cheyenne helps at the homeless shelter.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba does not approve of Barbra Jean's method of disciplining Henry; Brock and Van are mistaken for a gay couple when they go to a day spa.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: After Brock and Barbra Jean get audited, Brock informs Reba that the IRS is going to audit the last five years of their marriage.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Embarrassed Brock believes the only way he can pay off his back taxes is to sell his house and move to Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy, Rose and Blanche reminisce about how they all came to live together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche fears she may be pregnant, but is actually going through menopause.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The girls move into a Miami Beach hotel; they dress up to attend Burt Reynolds' movie premiere, only to be caught in a hotel raid, mistaken for prostitutes and dragged off to jail.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy begs Blanche to go out with her ex-husband, Stan, but becomes jealous when the couple hits it off; Sophia and Rose begin selling sandwiches on the Boardwalk but inadvertently make an enemy of another vendor.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Dean's sharing a car with his estranged wife and distant living arrangement make it difficult for him and Rory to be alone together.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.sub-title: We Got Us a Pippi Virgin
programme.desc: Lorelai suggests that she and Luke double-date with Rory and Dean, but things don't quite go as planned; Emily and Richard are lonely and lost without each other, but neither wants to take the first step toward reconciliation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Lorelai and Sookie are thrilled when author Norman Mailer and a young reporter make return visits to the inn's dining room, but Sookie's awe turns to annoyance when the writer fails to order any food.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Royal Hearts
programme.desc: Montana rancher Hank learns that he's the last heir of the late King of Merania and has inherited the throne. His daughter Kelly convinces the reluctant royal to step in as king, so the country can keep its independence.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The More Love Grows
programme.desc: Helen gets blindsided when her husband asks for a separation. With help from a friendly vet and a rambunctious stray dog, she rediscovers her strength and begins to rebuild her life.

programme.title: Love Struck Café
programme.desc: An aspiring architect gets the opportunity of a lifetime when she's chosen to develop her home town's lake into an entertainment complex. Unfortunately, to complete the project, she must convince a lifelong friend to leave her family's home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Curious Caterer Mysteries
programme.desc: Goldy Berry is a Colorado caterer who's thrust into the role of town sleuth to help solve a friend's mysterious death. With the clock ticking, she strikes up an unlikely partnership with a detective to find the killer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: A neighbor dies shortly after having a heated argument with Rose.

programme.desc: Rose befriends Dorothy's former college buddy (Lois Nettleton), not knowing that the woman is a lesbian.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Dr. Jack Morgan returns to Houston with the intention of resuming his romance with Reba, despite the fact that he is still married.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba advises Van to treat Cheyenne as an equal in the family budget, which prompts him to give her an allowance.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: In an effort to save Brock and Barbra Jean from losing their home, Reba and Van buy their house and rent it out to them.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: After the family makes fun of Reba's poor eyesight, she secretly gets laser eye surgery, which leaves her temporarily blind.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose, Blanche and Dorothy take a vacation at a resort that doesn't live up to its reputation.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: While Dorothy is laid off from teaching, she finds work at the same museum where Blanche goes to work.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy and Blanche contrive an answer to Rose's personal ad.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia takes action when a depressed, gun-toting Santa Claus threatens to ruin Christmas for her and her housemates.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Logan brings Rory to an event staged by his secret society, where she finds herself participating in a thrilling and dangerous stunt.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Rory is touched when Emily and Richard throw a party to introduce her to their Yale alumni friends; when Dean arrives at the party to pick up Rory, it is clear to him that he has no place in her privileged world.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Rory and Lorelai decide to confront Richard and Emily, individually, about their separation, but when Emily announces her plans to start dating again, they have no chance.

programme.title: Hats Off to Love
programme.desc: Stella designs hats and fascinators for socialite Rosalind and meets her son Christian who's training a horse to compete in the Louisville Derby.
